CustomField.description: Flat Rate Charge: This rate applies up to the utilization level specified in the Threshold Rate Utilization field. Note that the field allows precision up to six decimal places. However, the Threshold Rate field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Flat Rate Charge: This rate applies up to the utilization level specified in the Threshold Rate Utilization field. Note that the field allows precision up to six decimal places. However, the Threshold Rate field, which has a precision of two decimal places, always supersedes this precise field (keep it blank if you need more precision)
CustomField.label: Threshold Rate (Precise)
